title: Your current role
blurb: One-line description of what you do and the impact.
context: Optional: who is the client, team size, what's at stake. 2-3 sentences max.
narrative: Optional Markdown. Tell the long story of this role like you would over coffee — what you walked into, the turning point, what you shipped. The page will not render this by default; the LLM agent reads it and decides when it's relevant to surface.
anecdotes: A short, citable story (1-3 sentences) the agent can quote when it fits the conversation.
Another anecdote — the more specific, the more memorable.
achievements: Concrete, ideally quantified (e.g. +40% throughput, audit passed first try)
